name: GOLFTEC Owings Mills - Pikesville
address: 1848 Reisterstown Rd Suite D, Pikesville, MD 21208
about: GOLFTEC Owings Mills - Pikesville is a golf training center focused on data-driven instruction. It offers golf lessons, club fitting, and practice sessions using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback. The facility features indoor training bays with simulator technology for both lessons and practice, with coaching available to build personalized improvement plans. GOLFTEC also has a pro shop offering equipment and apparel, with members receiving a 10% discount on retail purchases.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using OPTIMOTION and launch monitor technology
Personalized coaching plans with PGA-certified instructors
Access to training bays with advanced simulator technology for practice
On-site club fitting to optimize equipment performance
Pro shop with 10% discount for members on golf gear

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as a product sold and integrated with third-party apps

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and fittings, though you can bring your own clubs if preferred. Club fittings start at $95 and use launch monitors to match you with the perfect equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services, so outside food and drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs with video analysis, launch monitors, and easy-to-follow lessons designed for younger players.
